caption: The video presents a presentation on psychological interventions. The initial scene features a slide titled "Test intuitive psych interventions: Congo" with a sub-heading "Talk Show vs Soap Opera" and a photograph of several people sitting in a circle outdoors in a rural setting, some wearing traditional attire and others in casual clothing. As the video progresses, a graph appears on the right side of the slide, plotting "Salt Donated" against "control" and "experimental" groups, with a legend indicating "Soap" and "Soap + Talk." The presentation then transitions to a slide titled "Test intuitive psych interventions: Roma," which lists "Europe's largest minority group" and "Historical injustices: Roma Holocaust." The final frame adds two overlapping images of a "Fake Article," one highlighting the phrase "groups are malleable" and the other highlighting "groups are fixed," alongside a note mentioning "#1: group malleability (Halperin... Dweck et al., 2011)."
